description.value: Aura faint conjuration, evocation, illusion, and transmutation; CL 5th; Slot armor; Price 5,720 gp; Weight 15 lbs. DESCRIPTION This +1 shadow leather armor is usually a neutral brown or gray color and is tight-fitting so it can be worn under bulky clothing or a disguise. The wearer can use acid splash, dancing lights, and mage hand each once per day CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells acid splash, dancing lights, invisibility, mage hand, silence; Price 2,940 gp
